title: Portable Context Control Plane — ResolvedSelectionDecision
description: Internal object schema for a single ResolvedSelectionDecision record produced by the Conflict Resolver. Extends the SelectionDecision shape with conflict-resolution additions (resolvedBy, inputDecisionIds, resolutionRule, losingDecisions) and budget-hint survival fields from docs/06 §27. Canonical owner: docs/06 §11 and §27.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-3 (Batch C creation). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. resolutionRule $refs enums.shared.schema.json#ResolutionRule. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3, §11.6, §27.

componentId.description: The validated registry component ID this resolved decision applies to. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1.

finalAction.description: The resolved action value for this component after conflict resolution. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1.

finalPath.description: The resolved path value for this component after conflict resolution. Must be consistent with finalAction. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1.

resolvedBy.description: Identifies the producing module. Always 'conflict_resolver' for ResolvedSelectionDecision records. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1.

inputDecisionIds.description: IDs of all SelectionDecision records that were inputs to this conflict resolution. For a no-conflict component (resolutionRule: no_conflict), this contains exactly one ID. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1.

resolutionRule.description: The canonical priority rule that produced the winning decision. Strict 14-value enum per docs/06 §11.3.1a — any unrecognized value is a harness failure. 'no_conflict' is valid only for no-conflict components (single unambiguous decision). Future additions require an explicit cross-spec decision pass. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1a.

decisionId.description: ID of the losing SelectionDecision record.

action.description: The action from the losing decision.

path.description: The path from the losing decision.

defeatedBy.description: Human-readable or coded reason why this decision was defeated (e.g., 'safety_hard_protection', 'runtime_unavailable_defer'). Must not contain raw content.

losingDecisions.description: Array of losing decisions. Each entry records the decisionId, action, path, and defeatedBy reason. Empty array when no decision was a true loser (e.g., when resolutionRule is no_conflict or when all inputs are include decisions merged into a single winner with no distinct loser). Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1, §11.5 Case 5.

warningsEmitted.description: Array of warning codes emitted during this conflict resolution entry. Empty array if no warnings were emitted for this component. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

resolvedAt.description: Monotonic step counter value at the time this decision was resolved. Not wall-clock time. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

hadGateConvertedDecisions.description: Optional. true if one or more input decisions had actionChanged: true in their selectorTrace entry (i.e., the injection gate converted the action before the Conflict Resolver received it). Present only when gate conversion was detected. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

gateConvertedTraceRefs.description: Optional. Array of trace entry IDs (from SelectionDecision.traceRefs) for each gate-converted input decision. Present only when hadGateConvertedDecisions: true. The referenced selectorTrace entries carry originalCandidateAction and originalCandidatePath as the canonical source of pre-gate context. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

preGateActions.description: Optional. Array of originalCandidateAction values from each gate-converted input decision, in the same order as gateConvertedTraceRefs. Informational summary only; selectorTrace is canonical. Present only when hadGateConvertedDecisions: true. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

preGatePaths.description: Optional. Array of originalCandidatePath values from each gate-converted input decision, in the same order as gateConvertedTraceRefs. Informational summary only; selectorTrace is canonical. Present only when hadGateConvertedDecisions: true. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

budgetHint.description: Budget hint merged from input decisions via the §27.5 priority order. The highest-priority hint across all input decisions wins — this is not necessarily the hint from the action/path-winning decision. Absent if no input decision had any budget hint and mergeRule is 'no_hint'. Must be absent for resolved defer/runtime_unavailable decisions (runtime_unavailable suppresses generic budget hints). Canonical: docs/06 §27.3-§27.5.

budgetReason.description: Coded atom from the source decision that contributed the budgetHint. Present only when budgetHint is present. Canonical: docs/06 §27.3.

tokensApproxObserved.description: tokensApprox value from the source decision that contributed the budgetHint. Present only when budgetHint is present. Canonical: docs/06 §27.3.

budgetPriorityObserved.description: budgetPriority from the action/path-winning decision. Present only when budgetHint is present. Canonical: docs/06 §27.3.

budgetCriticalObserved.description: budgetCritical flag from the action/path-winning decision. Present only when budgetHint is present. Canonical: docs/06 §27.3.

budgetWarningCodes.description: Merged union of all budgetWarningCodes from all input decisions. Present only when budgetHint is present or when runtime_unavailable_no_budget_savings was on any input. Canonical: docs/06 §27.3-§27.4.

tokenSource.description: Which cost source was used for the promoted budgetHint (from §23). Present only when budgetHint is expensive_optional or candidate_optional. Canonical: docs/06 §23.5, §27.3.

thresholdUsed.description: The static MVP expensive_optional threshold applied (always 500 in MVP). Present only when budgetHint is expensive_optional. Canonical: docs/06 §23.2, §23.5.

estimatedTokensFromChars.description: ceil(charsApprox / 4) computed when tokenSource is charsApprox_estimate. Present only when tokenSource is charsApprox_estimate. Canonical: docs/06 §23.3 Rule 2.

charsApproxObserved.description: charsApprox value from the source decision when tokenSource is charsApprox_estimate. Present only when tokenSource is charsApprox_estimate. Canonical: docs/06 §23.5.

thresholdCrossed.description: Field-name atom identifying which budget limit was exceeded for over_budget_protected (e.g., 'totalPromptTokenTarget', 'maxScaffoldTokens'). Must be a field-name atom, not free-form string. Present only when budgetHint is over_budget_protected. Canonical: docs/06 §25.4, §27.3.

applicableBudgetLimit.description: The integer value of the budget limit that was crossed (from budgetState). Present only when budgetHint is over_budget_protected. Canonical: docs/06 §25.4, §27.3.

riskFlag.description: Risk flag promoted from any input decision carrying budget_infeasible_protected_component, regardless of which decision won the action/path. Present only when budgetHint is over_budget_protected. Canonical: docs/06 §25.3, §27.3.

mergeRuleTrace.description: Which budget-hint merge rule was applied during Conflict Resolution. Must be exactly one of the four coded values. Present on all resolved decisions where budget-hint merge logic ran. Canonical: docs/06 §27.4, §27.7.

budgetHintSourceDecisionId.description: ID of the losing input decision from which the budgetHint was promoted. Present only when mergeRuleTrace is budget_hint_promoted_from_losing_decision. Canonical: docs/06 §27.4, §27.7.
